title: na./eu. lightwalletd endpoints unverified; fail first connect
description:
wallet/src/client.rs:17-20 — DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS lists three URLs. Only mainnet.lightwalletd.com:9067 is documented by ECC. The na.lightwalletd.com:9067 and eu.lightwalletd.com:9067 subdomain forms appear to be speculation; no ECC documentation or community documentation confirms they exist. If they are wrong, connect_with_failover() logs two 'unreachable' warnings on every startup and the only functional endpoint is the first one — the failover list provides no actual redundancy.

**Why:** Hardcoded endpoints that don't exist are worse than a shorter verified list, because they add latency (TLS timeout per unreachable URL) and false confidence in redundancy.
**How to apply:** Verify each URL against current ECC or community lightwalletd endpoint lists before shipping. Remove unverified entries or replace with documented alternatives.
close_reason: Fixed: removed unverified na./eu. subdomain endpoints. Only mainnet.lightwalletd.com:9067 (ECC-documented) remains. Comment explains the removal rationale.
